title: Dostana
subTitle: Sam and Kunal pretend to be a gay couple in order to share an apartment in Miami with Neha. However, their plan gets complicated when both of them fall in love with her.

title: Aladdin
subTitle: In the heart of an enchanted city, an Arabian thief finds a magic lamp with a genie inside and tries to win a princess's heart by saving her from the schemes of an evil sorcerer.

title: Auzaar
subTitle: Suraj, a police officer, is assigned to arrest his friend Yash, whose father runs an illegal business. He must now persuade his friend to make his father change his ways to avoid the consequences.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Tumko Na Bhool Paayenge
subTitle: Veer, a villager, becomes restless after he is haunted by the visions of his past. When he is attacked on the day of his wedding, he forces his parents to reveal the truth about his identity.

title: Jaal
subTitle: Fate plays a cruel game when Shankar gets hired by a rich woman named Amita who bears an uncanny resemblance with Meenabai, the person who breaks his family apart.

title: Ghar Ghar Ki Kahani
subTitle: Ram begins to suspect that his wife, Seeta, is having an affair with his brother, Amar. His suspicion remains even after Amar gets married, creating problems within his family.

title: Welcome
subTitle: Two thugs meet Rajiv, who belongs to a respectable family, and want to fix their sister's wedding with him. However, when Rajiv's uncle refuses to the match, a series of hilarious situations occur.

title: Baghban
subTitle: Raj and Pooja live an upsetting life when their sons refuse to reciprocate their affections and take care of them.

title: Vinashak
subTitle: A diligent and determined police officer is tasked with uncovering the truth behind a crooked warden involved in illicit weapon trafficking.

title: Rajoo Dada
subTitle: Rajoo intends to exact revenge on his parents' killers and grows up to be a criminal. However, he needs to join hands with his brother, who is a police officer, to find the culprits.

title: Chintu Ji
subTitle: Rishi, the son of a legendary actor, decides to enter politics and go to Hadbahedi, a remote village. However, he creates havoc by misleading the villagers who trust him simply because he is famous.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Bandhan
subTitle: Thakur marries his mistress when his first wife, Pooja, is unable to bear children. His brother-in-law opposes this marriage to save the dignity of his sister and fights to reunite them.

title: Mujrim
subTitle: Yashoda, a widow, brings up her children with love and honesty. However, she is disappointed when her son Shankar is arrested for breaking the law and disowns him.

title: Deewana
subTitle: A newlywed Kajal gets widowed when her husband, Ravi, is killed by his enemies. She moves to another city and gets married to Raja, but her life takes a turn when Ravi returns from the dead.

title: Dil Pardesi Ho Gaya
subTitle: Sunny travels to Pakistan to rescue his brother, Major Ram, who is a prisoner of war. However, he falls for a local girl who has a penchant for trouble.

title: Swarg
subTitle: Krishna worships his master, Sahabji, but circumstances lead to his ouster from the house. He works hard, becomes a powerful man and returns to restore his master's honour.

title: Kachche Dhaage
subTitle: Stepbrothers Aftab and Jai, who loathe each other, must learn to put aside their differences and work together to prove their innocence in a terrorism case.

title: Bhumika: The Role
subTitle: Urvashi who becomes an actress with the help of Keshav, ends up marrying him. However, things complicate when she indulges in affairs with prominent men in the film industry.

title: Trikal: Past Present Future
subTitle: Anna, who hails from a rich Goan family, reluctantly agrees to marry Erasmo despite loving someone else. However, her life takes a turn upon discovering about her pregnancy.
